seoTitle: About Jireh Cooler | South Florida AC Company Since 1994
metaDescription: Jireh Cooler is a family-operated, state-certified air conditioning company serving Broward and Palm Beach County since 1994.
heading: Family-Operated. State-Certified. South Florida, Since 1994.
intro: Jireh Cooler has provided air conditioning installation, repair, and maintenance to South Florida homes and businesses since 1994. The company is owned and operated by Moyses Oliveira, a graduate of South Technical Education Center, alongside his wife Evelise Oliveira.
story: Jireh Cooler was built on a simple idea: South Florida homeowners and business owners deserve an air conditioning company they can actually reach, and actually trust, when something goes wrong.

For three decades, that has meant showing up, diagnosing the real problem, and doing the work right the first time, whether it's a same-day repair on a 95-degree afternoon or a full system replacement planned months in advance.
As a family-operated business, Jireh Cooler is led directly by its owners rather than a corporate call center, and every job carries that same level of personal accountability.

values.label: Certified Expertise
values.description: State-Certified Air Conditioning Contractor, license CAC1815741, insured for residential and commercial work.

values.label: Direct Accountability
values.description: Owner-operated since 1994, with hands-on involvement in how jobs are scoped, priced, and completed.

values.label: Always Available
values.description: Emergency service available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year.

values.label: Built to Last
values.description: Work performed to code, with major brands including Carrier, Bryant, Rheem, Goodman, and Lennox.

imageAlt: Moyses and Evelise Oliveira, owners of Jireh Cooler
secondaryHeading: Every Job Starts With a Plan
secondaryText: Before a technician ever picks up a tool, the details get worked out on paper: system layout, equipment sizing, and what the job actually requires. That upfront planning is what keeps installations on schedule and free of surprises.
secondaryImageAlt: Jireh Cooler owner reviewing a system layout blueprint
leadershipHeading: Led by Moyses Oliveira, Not a Call Center
leadershipText: Moyses Oliveira founded Jireh Cooler in 1994 and has run every year of it hands-on, a South Technical Education Center-trained technician who built the company from the ground up alongside his wife Evelise.

Three decades later, that same hands-on approach still shapes how the company operates: technicians trained to Moyses' standard, jobs scoped with his direct input, and a customer's ability to reach an owner who has actually done the work himself.

That continuity, the same ownership and leadership since day one, is what customers across Broward and Palm Beach County point to when they explain why they trust Jireh Cooler with their home or business.
leadershipImageAlt: Moyses Oliveira, owner of Jireh Cooler, on-site at a South Florida construction project
teamHeading: A Team That Meets, Not Just Dispatches
teamText: Jireh Cooler's technicians meet regularly to stay aligned, not just to catch up. These sessions cover new equipment and manufacturer specifications, technical standards for how a job should be done, and how a call should be handled from the first phone call to the final walkthrough.

That consistency is deliberate. A customer in Boca Raton should get the same standard of work and communication as a customer in Fort Lauderdale, and regular team alignment is how that stays true as the company grows.
teamImageAlt: Jireh Cooler technicians and staff in a team training and alignment meeting
